series_description: Quaotations and bids that are solicited by the individual institutions on Commissary and Industrial and Entertainment Fund items.

series_description: Storeroom copy, Business Office Copy, and Originating Department Copy.

series_description: Used to deposit regular income in General Revenue Fund and Rotary Acccounts

series_description: Record of the automobile license number on the provate cars of employees, shows employee's name, working assignment, make and model of automobile, and current license number.

series_description: File maintained for each employee which may include, but is not limited to items such as application/resume, new hire documentation, position descriptions, human resource requests, recommendation for hire, personnel actions, training records, change of address forms, emergency contact information, letters of commendation, policy and procedure acknowledgements, performance evaluations, disciplinary documents, and separation records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain portions used to verify employment, retirement, or OPERS contributions 50 years after separation for employees prior to 2012.
